ins.line2: §f• §eGOLDEN RULE: §fAll macro commands execute strictly via quick double-pressing assigned keys within a 400ms window.
ins.line3: §f• §6HOME MACRO: §b/home o §fon §eO key§f. Instantly teleports you to your home point named 'o' (make sure to rename your home point to O inside the game).
ins.line4: §f• §6RTP MACRO: §b/rtp §fon §eR key§f. Random teleportation feature. Comes with a built-in 20-second cooldown (fully adjustable in the configuration dashboard).
ins.line5: §f• §6SPAWN MACRO: §b/spawn §fon §eC key§f. Provides lightning-fast emergency evacuation to the world spawn point via quick double-tap.
ins.line6: §f• §6WARP MACRO: §b/warp §fon §eP key§f. Automatically teleports you to your selected warp destination (village is available by default).
ins.line7: §f• §aWARP FEATURE (HOLD & RELEASE): §fHold the §eP key§f to open the target selection layout. Navigate destinations using Up/Down arrows. Release the §eP key§f to instantly dispatch the packet and warp.
ins.line8: §f• §6TPA/TP MACRO: §b/tpa §for §b/tp §fon §eB key§f. Introduces a completely redesigned, highly automated request engine.
ins.line9: §f• §aTRAFFIC LIGHT FEATURE (TAP B): §fSingle-tapping the §eB key§f displays the targeted player's network state right on your actionbar for exactly 3 seconds. Colors: Green — online, Yellow — pending request, Red — offline.
ins.line10: §f• §aSELECTOR FEATURE (HOLD B): §fHold the §eB key§f for over 300ms to pull the server TAB layout. Navigate users with Up/Down arrows. Release the key to lock the username and auto-save it to the config file.
ins.line11: §f• §aNAME FILTER FEATURE: §fThe mod scans the server online list and forcefully strips chat prefixes, color codes, rank tags, and bracketed text (e.g. [pudge] is completely ignored), ensuring a clean packet delivery.
ins.line12: §f• §dSETTINGS DASHBOARD (HOLD M): §fHold the §eM key§f for 3 seconds in clean gameplay to overlay the main control mapping dashboard. Scroll with Up/Down arrows, press Enter to remap or select entries.
ins.line13: §f• §dCOOLDOWN & MODE ADJUSTMENT: §fOn the RTP cooldown row, use Left/Right arrow keys to tweak seconds. On the command mode row, use Left/Right arrows to toggle the B key behavior from user /tpa to admin /tp.
ins.line14: §f• §dWARP CLIPBOARD FEATURE: §fPress Enter on the '+ ADD WARP' row to grab text from Windows clipboard, replace spaces with underscores, and generate a new warp slot. To delete, adjust targets on the row below via Left/Right arrows and hit Enter.
ins.line15: §f• §dPLAYER CLIPBOARD FEATURE: §fPress Enter on the '+ ADD PLAYER' row to manually inject a username from Windows clipboard. The option below completely purges the selected target from memory (displays a red 'Игрок не выбран' on quick tap if empty).
ins.line16: §f• §bUPCOMING ROADMAP: §fThe automated direct messaging shortcut §b/m §fis currently under active development and will be introduced in future updates.
ins.line17: §e• SYSTEM REQUIREMENT: §fTo guarantee correct network packet dispatching, thread synchronization, and hold-key processing, Fabric API must be installed.
